content.json:
# Azure Marketplace Readiness Auditor
Use this workbook to score Azure-visible architecture signals that affect how ready a product looks for marketplace motion.

This workbook reads Azure Resource Graph metadata only. It helps you assess observable hosting, security, integration, and operations signals. It does **not** inspect your source code, publisher agreements, Microsoft Entra app registrations, or Marketplace APIs directly.

parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.label: Subscriptions
parameters.query:
Resources
| summarize ResourceCount = count() by subscriptionId
| order by ResourceCount desc
| extend Rank = row_number()
| project value = subscriptionId, label = subscriptionId, selected = Rank <= 3

content.query:
Resources
| summarize ProductHosts = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'microsoft.solutions/applications', 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions')), IntegrationEndpoints = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'microsoft.app/containerapps') or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp')), ObservabilityAssets = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.insights/components', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces')), KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), IdentityEnabledResources = countif(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type))), BackboneResources = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts'))
| extend ReadinessScore = 25 * iff(ProductHosts > 0, 1, 0) + 20 * iff(IntegrationEndpoints > 0, 1, 0) + 20 * iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 1, 0) + 20 * iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 1, 0) + 15 * iff(BackboneResources > 0, 1, 0)
| extend PassedChecks = toint(iff(ProductHosts > 0, 1, 0) + iff(IntegrationEndpoints > 0, 1, 0) + iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 1, 0) + iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 1, 0) + iff(BackboneResources > 0, 1, 0))
| extend TotalPossible = 100, MissingChecks = 5 - PassedChecks, ScorePercent = round(todouble(ReadinessScore), 1)
content.title: Readiness Score Summary
content.noDataMessage: No resources found in the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
(Resources
| summarize ProductHosts = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'microsoft.solutions/applications', 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions')), IntegrationEndpoints = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'microsoft.app/containerapps') or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp')), ObservabilityAssets = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.insights/components', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces')), KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), IdentityEnabledResources = countif(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type))), BackboneResources = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts'))
| project Status = 'Passed', Checks = toint(iff(ProductHosts > 0, 1, 0) + iff(IntegrationEndpoints > 0, 1, 0) + iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 1, 0) + iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 1, 0) + iff(BackboneResources > 0, 1, 0)))
| union
(Resources
| summarize ProductHosts = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'microsoft.solutions/applications', 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions')), IntegrationEndpoints = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'microsoft.app/containerapps') or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp')), ObservabilityAssets = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.insights/components', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces')), KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), IdentityEnabledResources = countif(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type))), BackboneResources = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts'))
| project Status = 'Missing', Checks = toint(5 - (iff(ProductHosts > 0, 1, 0) + iff(IntegrationEndpoints > 0, 1, 0) + iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 1, 0) + iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 1, 0) + iff(BackboneResources > 0, 1, 0))))
content.title: Passed vs Missing Checks
content.noDataMessage: No checks could be computed from the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
Resources
| summarize ManagedAppAssets = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.solutions/applications', 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions')), ApplicationHosts = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters')), EndpointPlaneAssets = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'microsoft.app/containerapps') or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp'))
| extend RecommendedPath = case(ManagedAppAssets > 0, 'Azure Managed Application', ApplicationHosts > 0 and EndpointPlaneAssets > 0, 'SaaS or Container Offer', ApplicationHosts > 0, 'Listing plus implementation services', 'Build product surface first')
| extend Rationale = case(ManagedAppAssets > 0, 'Managed application assets already exist in Azure.', ApplicationHosts > 0 and EndpointPlaneAssets > 0, 'An application host and an endpoint plane are both visible.', ApplicationHosts > 0, 'You appear to have a host, but not the supporting endpoint layer that most transactable offers need.', 'Azure does not currently expose a clear product surface in the selected subscriptions.')
| project RecommendedPath, ManagedAppAssets, ApplicationHosts, EndpointPlaneAssets, Rationale
content.title: Observed Offer Path
content.noDataMessage: No offer path could be inferred from the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
(Resources
| summarize ProductHosts = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'microsoft.solutions/applications', 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions'))
| project Check = 'Offer surface', Status = iff(ProductHosts > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 25, Evidence = strcat(ProductHosts, ' candidate hosts found'), WhyItMatters = 'Marketplace motion starts with a workload Azure can actually observe and deploy around.', RecommendedAction = 'Identify the specific app, container, cluster, or managed application you want to package.')
| union
(Resources
| summarize IntegrationEndpoints = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'microsoft.app/containerapps') or (type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp'))
| project Check = 'Provisioning or integration endpoint plane', Status = iff(IntegrationEndpoints > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 20, Evidence = strcat(IntegrationEndpoints, ' endpoint resources found'), WhyItMatters = 'Transactable offers usually need some externally reachable plane for provisioning, webhook handling, or integration orchestration.', RecommendedAction = 'Add API Management, Function Apps, Logic Apps, or Container Apps to handle provisioning and fulfillment workflows.')
| union
(Resources
| summarize ObservabilityAssets = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.insights/components', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'))
| project Check = 'Observability', Status = iff(ObservabilityAssets > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 20, Evidence = strcat(ObservabilityAssets, ' observability resources found'), WhyItMatters = 'Operational visibility is expected internally and during technical review.', RecommendedAction = 'Add Application Insights or Log Analytics and wire workload telemetry into it.')
| union
(Resources
| summarize KeyVaults = countif(type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'), IdentityEnabledResources = countif(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type)))
| project Check = 'Secrets and workload identity', Status = iff(KeyVaults > 0 and IdentityEnabledResources > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 20, Evidence = strcat(KeyVaults, ' key vaults, ', IdentityEnabledResources, ' identity-enabled resources'), WhyItMatters = 'A transactable product should not depend on hard-coded credentials or weak secret handling.', RecommendedAction = 'Use managed identity on the workload and move secrets into Key Vault.')
| union
(Resources
| summarize BackboneResources = countif(type in~ ('microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts'))
| project Check = 'Async backbone or durable state', Status = iff(BackboneResources > 0, 'Passed', 'Missing'), Weight = 15, Evidence = strcat(BackboneResources, ' backbone resources found'), WhyItMatters = 'Provisioning, plan changes, and customer lifecycle events usually need state or asynchronous processing.', RecommendedAction = 'Add storage, Service Bus, Event Grid, SQL, or Cosmos DB to support durable workflows.')
| extend PointsAwarded = iff(Status == 'Passed', Weight, 0)
| order by Status asc, Weight desc
content.title: Detailed Check Matrix
content.noDataMessage: No detailed checks could be computed from the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'microsoft.insights/components', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'microsoft.solutions/applications', 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions')
| summarize Resources = count() by Capability = case(type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp', 'Webhook-capable compute', type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites', 'Web application host', type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'Containerized app host', type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'Kubernetes host', type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'API front door', type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'Integration workflow', type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'Observability', type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'Secrets management', type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'Async provisioning or messaging', type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'Event routing', type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'State or artifact storage', type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'Tenant data store', type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions', 'Managed application assets', 'Other')
| order by Resources desc
content.title: Relevant Capability Distribution
content.noDataMessage: No relevant platform resources were found in the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'microsoft.insights/components', 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'microsoft.solutions/applications', 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions')
| extend Capability = case(type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites' and kind has 'functionapp', 'Webhook-capable compute', type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites', 'Web application host', type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'Containerized app host', type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'Kubernetes host', type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'API front door', type =~ 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'Integration workflow', type =~ 'microsoft.insights/components' or type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'Observability', type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'Secrets management', type =~ 'microsoft.servicebus/namespaces', 'Async provisioning or messaging', type =~ 'microsoft.eventgrid/systemtopics', 'Event routing', type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'State or artifact storage', type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers/databases' or type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'Tenant data store', type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applications' or type =~ 'microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitions', 'Managed application assets', 'Other')
| project Name = name, Capability, Type = type, Kind = coalesce(kind, ''), Subscription = subscriptionId, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Location = location, Identity = coalesce(tostring(identity.type), 'None')
| order by Capability asc, Name asc
content.title: Relevant Resource Inventory
content.noDataMessage: No relevant platform resources were found in the selected subscriptions.

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts')
| extend ExposureSignal = case(type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites', iff(tobool(properties.httpsOnly), 'HTTPS only enabled', 'HTTPS only disabled'), type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' and isnull(properties.configuration.ingress), 'Ingress not configured', type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps' and tobool(properties.configuration.ingress.external), 'External ingress enabled', type =~ 'microsoft.app/containerapps', 'Internal only or ingress disabled', type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) == 'Disabled', 'Public network disabled', type =~ 'microsoft.apimanagement/service' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) == 'Enabled', 'Public network enabled', type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) == 'Disabled', 'Public network disabled', type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) == 'Enabled', 'Public network enabled', type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) == 'Disabled', 'Public network disabled', type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess) == 'Enabled', 'Public network enabled', 'Signal not reported')
| extend IdentitySignal = case(isnotempty(tostring(identity.type)), tostring(identity.type), type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'n/a', 'None')
| project Name = name, Type = type, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Location = location, ExposureSignal, IdentitySignal
| order by Type asc, Name asc
content.title: Exposure And Identity Signals
content.noDataMessage: No exposure or identity signals were found for the selected subscriptions.

content.json: This workbook does **not** verify publisher setup, commercial marketplace enrollment, Microsoft Partner Agreement status, Microsoft Entra app registration configuration, SaaS Fulfillment API endpoints, metering APIs, pricing plans, private offers, or listing copy. Treat this as an architecture signal audit, not a compliance certificate.

> Publisher note: replace this block with your booking link, lead form, or implementation sprint offer before you publish the workbook externally.

Typical follow-up work after a low score:
1. Add or harden the provisioning endpoint plane.
2. Wire in observability and secret management.
3. Choose a concrete marketplace motion: managed application, SaaS or container, or services-first listing.
